parameters.name: vref
parameters.override_behavior: sets the analog full-scale reference and uniform quantization span

parameters.name: vh
parameters.override_behavior: sets the voltage-coded output high level

modeling_constraints: Use smooth voltage contributions for all output bits.
Do not introduce a clock, hidden state, current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.

properties.observable_contract: The output code represents the current vin level without requiring a clock or prior transient event.
The 0-to-vref input span is divided into eight ordered uniform code regions producing unsigned codes 0 through 7.
Inputs at or below 0 V produce code 0, and inputs at or above vref produce code 7.
d2 is the most significant output bit and d0 is the least significant output bit.
Each output bit approaches 0 V for logic low and vh for logic high with finite transition smoothing.

title: DC Aware ADC3bit
